zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Duxford於1565年8月24日出生在英國賀特福爾維斯特米爾時，她的父親Richard Duxford24歲，母親Joan23歲。她於1590年8月24日與Thomas Richardson在英國英格蘭賀特福爾維斯特米爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1630年3月4日在她的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Duxford于1565年8月24日出生在英国賀特福爾維斯特米爾时，她的父亲Richard Duxford24岁，母亲Joan23岁。她于1590年8月24日与Thomas Richardson在英国英格兰賀特福爾維斯特米爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1630年3月4日在她的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯。

nameMeanings.name: Duxford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Luxford in Crowborough, Sussex.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Duxford was born on 24 August 1565, in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, her father, Richard Duxford, was 24 and her mother, Joan, was 23. She married Thomas Richardson on 24 August 1590, in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 4 March 1630, in her hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Duxford est née le 24 août 1565, à Westmill, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Duxford, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Richardson le 24 août 1590, à Westmill, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 mars 1630, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Duxford am 24. August 1565 in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Duxford 24 und ihre Mutter Joan 23. Sie hat am 24. August 1590 in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Richardson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. März 1630 im Alter von 64 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Thomas Richardson il 24 agosto 1590, nel Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Duxfordが1565年8月24日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウエストミルで生まれた時，父Richard Duxfordは24歳，母Joanは23歳であった。1590年8月24日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウエストミルでThomas Richardsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1630年3月4日に故郷で64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスにて埋葬された。

ko.London St Helen Bishopsgate, London, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 헬 비숍스가트
ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Duxford(이)가 1565년 8월 24일 영국 허트퍼드실르 웨스트미에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Duxford(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1590년 8월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 웨스트미에서 Thomas Richardson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1630년 3월 4일 그녀의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Duxford nasceu em 24 de agosto de 1565, em Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Duxford, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Richardson em 24 de agosto de 1590, em Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de março de 1630, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.London St Helen Bishopsgate, London, Eng: ст хелен бишопсгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Duxford родилась 24 августа 1565 г. в местности вестмилл, хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Duxford было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Richardson 24 августа 1590 г. в местности вестмилл, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 4 марта 1630 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Duxford nació el 24 de agosto de 1565, en Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Duxford, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joan, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Thomas Richardson el 24 de agosto de 1590, en Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 4 de marzo de 1630, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
